name: Get Funded Amount of Jobs by FInance Source

content.query:
SELECT
fns.[Division]
,fns.[LP_FinanceSourceID]
,fns.[FinanceSource]
,fns.[Active]
,sum([GrossAmount]) as GrossAmount
,sum([FundedAmount]) as [FundedAmount]
,sum([FinanceFee]) as FinanceFee
FROM 
[EDW].[DIM_FINANCE_SOURCE] fns
,[EDW].[FACT_JOB] job
WHERE
fns.FinanceSourceID = job.FinanceSourceID
group BY
fns.[Division]
,fns.[LP_FinanceSourceID]
,fns.[FinanceSource]
,fns.[Active]
order by 
FundedAmount desc
